content:
I was looking at Celeste skill descriptions, and noted something odd.
Her card states
"When healing, gain +3 [Tentacle DMG]", 
but when leveling the skill up, it says "Temp. Tentacle DMG ATK*10%"

Sooo.. is it meant to be permanent tentacle dmg, or temporary tentacle dmg? :D

(also "Aliemus" is spelled "Alienous" in the level-up thing)

This maybe just a translation error or something, in that case sorry for being in the wrong section 8)
Noticed this in HSR mode. "Loop Reflection" states its effect as <:warn:1408311425952387122> Discover, but does not reduce the cost of Pickman's Chromaphage.
Pickman 2 cost card had the effect of removing Void from the player, it was stated in his release kit and at the start, but was probably removed after translation changes

While the language display shows English everything is in Chinese
I’m using iOS 
Id: 101453573

Hello,
<@633215996508766229> 
I am a gamer from the Korean community. Many of us truly love this game, and recently more Korean players have started playing through the Play Store.

Because of this growing interest, our community is preparing a small tournament for players. We would really appreciate it if there were a way for others to spectate or for us to broadcast the matches.

We understand that this feature may not currently be available. However, we are planning to host many more tournaments like this in the future, so having spectating or broadcasting support would mean a lot to our community.

Below is the recruitment link for the upcoming tournament.
 LINK : https://arca.live/b/forgettingeve/164312123?p=1
Thank you for your time and for creating such a great game.

content: 我把普通、困难全刷了一遍，地图问号全走了，还是没有解锁

Seeing from the new patch notes that auto-battle will be disabled from character trials means there is now no easy way to complete the 50-card daily mission.
Why force players to grind through random battles every day? Many of us have limited free time, and do not want to log into a game every day unless we can complete daily tasks on auto.
